# Profile README — Setup

This repo is a GitHub **profile README** (repo name must equal your username: `KavinduAshain00/KavinduAshain00`).
Most of the README renders instantly from external image services. Three sections are
generated by GitHub Actions and need a one-time setup.

## 1. 🐍 Contribution Snake — `snake.yml`
- **No secrets required.** Uses the built-in `GITHUB_TOKEN`.
- Run **Actions → Generate Snake Animation → Run workflow** once.
- It publishes SVGs to an `output` branch (created automatically), which the README links to.

## 2. ⏱️ Weekly Coding Stats (WakaTime) — `waka-stats.yml`
Requires two repository secrets (**Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions → New repository secret**):

| Secret | Where to get it |
| ------ | --------------- |
| `WAKATIME_API_KEY` | https://wakatime.com/settings/account → "Secret API Key" |
| `GH_TOKEN` | A GitHub Personal Access Token with `repo` scope (https://github.com/settings/tokens) |

- You also need WakaTime installed in your editor(s) tracking time against your account.
- The action replaces everything between the `<!--START_SECTION:waka-->` and
  `<!--END_SECTION:waka-->` markers in `README.md`.
- Until the first successful run, that section stays empty — that's expected.

## Enabling Actions write access
Go to **Settings → Actions → General → Workflow permissions** and select
**Read and write permissions** so the workflows can commit/push.
